attractions.name: Calangute Beach
attractions.description: Popular tourist beach with water sports and a lively market.

attractions.name: Baga Beach
attractions.description: Known for nightlife, shacks and vibrant atmosphere.

attractions.name: Fort Aguada
attractions.description: 17th-century Portuguese fort with panoramic sea views.

attractions.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site housing relics of St. Francis Xavier.

food_places.name: Martin's Corner
food_places.description: Popular seafood restaurant beloved by locals and tourists.
